articles.title: Sudan’s RSF committed crimes against humanity in El Fasher, Amnesty says
articles.description:
Report accuses paramilitary force of crimes including ethnic cleansing in systemic campaign against civilians
The Sudanese paramilitary Rapid Support Forces committed crimes against humanity and ethnic cleansing during its seizure of El Fasher last year, Amnesty International has alleged.
Many of the crimes, including murder, torture, rape, enslavement and sexual slavery, were carried out as part of a widespread and systematic attack against civilians and amounted to crimes against humanity, the human rights organisation said in a report released on Wednesday.

In the coastal city of Durban, where violence had been expected, the streets were unusually quiet and shops were shuttered as tension hung thick in the air.

articles.title: Wednesday briefing: After two powerful earthquakes, what is the reality on the ground in Venezuela?
articles.description:
In today’s newsletter: A country already in crisis since the removal of its leader earlier this year by the US, now has to find a way to rebuild with little state presence in evidence
The shaking seemed to come from nowhere. In a moment captured by fishers off Venezuela’s Caribbean coast, two earthquakes struck seconds apart. Plumes of dust appear where buildings once stood in the recording as the camera rises and falls with the swell. The men rapidly head for the shore in search of their families. “I’m shaking,” says the cameraman.
Since the quakes struck last Wednesday, the search for missing loved ones has not stopped for scores of Venezuelans. Officially, more than 1,700 people have died. But tens of thousands remain missing: desperate relatives are walking up and down streets lined by rubble and collapsed buildings with photos of those they cannot find, asking for help.
World news | A child has been rescued from the rubble in Venezuela, six days since the country was hit by devastating twin earthquakes.
UK politics | Andy Burnham will have to find an extra £4.7bn for defence in his first budget, after Keir Starmer announced a £298bn defence investment plan (Dip) without having fully identified how it will be funded.
US politics | The US supreme court has upheld the constitutional guarantee of birthright citizenship, affirming that nearly all people born on US soil are American citizens and rejecting a central pillar of Donald Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda.
UK news | The European media group Axel Springer has completed its £575m takeover of the Telegraph, ending years of uncertainty over the future ownership of the 171-year-old titles.
US news | Nine matches in the World Cup group stage were played amid potentially dangerous heat and humidity, a Guardian analysis shows.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: ‘Tonnes of rubble’: 58,000 buildings estimated destroyed in Venezuela earthquakes
articles.description:
Preliminary analysis of satellite data suggests magnitude of natural disaster could dwarf official estimates

More than 58,000 buildings may have been damaged and destroyed by the twin earthquakes that hit Venezuela last week, according to a preliminary analysis of satellite data that suggests the scale of the destruction could dwarf official estimates.
Last Wednesday’s back-to-back quakes – which measured magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 – killed at least 1,943 people, injured more than 10,571, and left tens of thousands missing amid the rubble. The UN migration agency has said that up to 6.8 million people could be affected by the disasters, and would require shelter, water, sanitation, healthcare and essential relief items.

articles.summary: ヨーロッパ全体で推定1億5千万人が35度を超える気温を経験しており、ドイツ、デンマーク、チェコ共和国で記録的な熱波となった。

articles.title: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
articles.description: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.
articles.titleJa: ドイツのクリスマス市場襲撃犯に終身刑、6人殺害で
articles.summary: 2024年にクリスマス市場に車で突入し、9歳の子供と5人の女性を含む6人を殺害したターレブ・アル＝アブドゥルモフセン被告に終身刑が言い渡された。

articles.title: United, free and brilliant - can anyone stop France masterclass?
articles.description: France boss Didier Deschamps urges caution despite watching his side dismantle Sweden to leave Les Bleus fans dreaming of winning the World Cup.
articles.titleJa: 団結し、自由で、華麗 - フランスの圧勝を止められるか？
articles.summary: ディディエ・デシャン監督は慎重を促すも、スウェーデンを圧倒したフランス代表のパフォーマンスは、ワールドカップ優勝への夢をファンに抱かせた。

articles.title: Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
articles.description: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.
articles.titleJa: 怒れるベネズエラ国民、地震対応の政府の怠慢を非難
articles.summary: 双子の地震で被災した地域の人々が、政府からの支援不足を訴え、その対応の怠慢を非難している。

articles.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
articles.description: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラの瓦礫から新生児と母親が救出、赤ちゃんがどう生存を助けたか語る
articles.summary: 壊滅的な地震に見舞われたベネズエラで、生後18日の赤ちゃんフアン・ダビデの「奇跡の救出」が希望の象徴となっている。

articles.title: Anger directed at Venezuela's official response to earthquake recovery
articles.description: Residents in quake-affected areas have expressed anger over the state's efforts to locate survivors and help victims, the BBC's Orla Guerin reports.
articles.titleJa: ベネズエラの地震復興に対する政府の対応に怒りの声
articles.summary: 被災地の住民は、生存者捜索や被害者支援に対する政府の取り組みについて怒りを表明している。

articles.title: I hear my son crying beneath the rubble, says Venezuela earthquake survivor
articles.description: Andreina Valerio says she fears for her son, who is trapped with her partner and in-laws beneath a collapsed building.
articles.titleJa: 瓦礫の下で息子が泣いているのが聞こえる、とベネズエラ地震の生存者
articles.summary: アンドレイナ・バレリオさんは、崩壊した建物の下でパートナーや義理の両親とともに閉じ込められている息子を案じていると語った。

articles.title: Mexico rampant at fortress Azteca - and England could be next
articles.description: Mexico have won all four games and not conceded a goal at this World Cup. Their last-16 opponents must also contend with playing at the Azteca Stadium.
articles.titleJa: 砦アステカで猛威を振るうメキシコ、次はイングランドか
articles.summary: メキシコは今回のワールドカップで4戦全勝、無失点。ベスト16の対戦相手はアステカ・スタジアムでの試合にも対応しなければならない。

articles.title: Hincapie becomes second player sent off for covering mouth
articles.description: Ecuador defender Piero Hincapie became the second player at the World Cup to be dismissed for covering his mouth while confronting an opponent.
articles.titleJa: ヒンカピエ選手、口を覆う行為で二人目の退場者となる
articles.summary: エクアドル代表DFピエロ・ヒンカピエが、対戦相手と対峙中に口を覆う行為でワールドカップ二人目の退場者となった。

articles.title: Ecuador make Mexico fans hotel noise complaint
articles.description: Ecuador make a complaint to World Cup organisers over noisy local fans outside their team hotel before their last-32 match against co-hosts Mexico.
articles.titleJa: エクアドル、メキシコサポーターのホテル騒音に苦情
articles.summary: エクアドルが、共催国メキシコとのベスト32戦を前に、チームホテル外の騒々しい地元サポーターについてワールドカップ主催者に苦情を申し立てた。

articles.title: The Paraguay hero who sold his kit when his son was born
articles.description: Orlando Gill has become Paraguay's World Cup hero but was in football obscurity 18 months ago and had to sell his kit to support his family after the premature birth of his son.
articles.titleJa: 息子誕生時にキットを売ったパラグアイの英雄
articles.summary: オルランド・ギルはパラグアイのワールドカップの英雄となったが、18ヶ月前は無名で、息子の早産後、家族を支えるためにキットを売らなければならなかった。

articles.title: Paraguay's tears of joy over World Cup shock
articles.description: How Paraguay marked one of the biggest wins in their footballing history with euphoric celebrations.
articles.titleJa: ワールドカップでの衝撃的な勝利にパラグアイの歓喜の涙
articles.summary: パラグアイが、サッカー史上最大の勝利の一つをどのように歓喜の祝賀で祝ったか。

articles.title: What to know about the looming  deadline on North American free trade
articles.description: The US, Canada and Mexico were to reach an agreement on whether to extend their free trade pact by 1 July. All signs point to them blowing past that deadline.
articles.titleJa: 北米自由貿易協定の差し迫った期限について知っておくべきこと
articles.summary: 米国、カナダ、メキシコは7月1日までに自由貿易協定の延長について合意するはずだったが、期限を過ぎる可能性が高い。

articles.title: When surveillance becomes part of the landscape
articles.description: The advance of these technologies is not occurring as an exception. They are established silently, without public debate, without transparency and without people knowing the fate of their data
articles.titleJa: 監視が日常の一部となるとき
articles.summary: 監視技術の進歩が公の議論や透明性を欠いたまま静かに定着し、人々のデータ利用実態が不明な状況について説明します。

articles.title: Three years of Pride: Santiago Méndez’s visual archive of queer Venezuela
articles.description: An interview with Venezuelan visual artist and photographer Santiago Méndez, who has exhaustively documente queerness and Pride in Caracas for the last three years.
articles.titleJa: 3年間のプライド：サンティアゴ・メンデスによるベネズエラのクィアの視覚アーカイブ
articles.summary: ベネズエラの視覚芸術家サンティアゴ・メンデスがカラカスで3年間にわたりクィアとプライドを記録した視覚アーカイブに関するインタビュー記事です。

articles.title: Brazil’s former First Lady juggles Christian conservatism, cracks open the far right’s gender contradictions
articles.description: With a personable approach to politics and a pastoral tone to her speeches, Michelle Bolsonaro juggles the roles of being her imprisoned husband’s caretaker and a political figure wannabe
articles.titleJa: ブラジルの元ファーストレディ、キリスト教保守主義と極右のジェンダー矛盾を操る
articles.summary: ミシェル・ボルソナロ元ブラジル大統領夫人が、収監された夫の世話役と政治家志望の役割を両立させ、キリスト教保守主義と極右のジェンダー矛盾を巧みに操る様子を報じます。

articles.title: The case of Shakira Galíndez highlights a growing crisis for trans Venezuelan asylum seekers in the U.S.
articles.description: Shakira Galíndez fled Venezuela due to her vulnerability as a trans woman. Today, she is in a men’s detention facility, exposed to further discrimination, violence and deportation.
articles.titleJa: シャキーラ・ガリンデス氏の事例が浮き彫りにする、米国におけるベネズエラ人トランスジェンダー亡命希望者の危機
articles.summary: ベネズエラから米国に亡命したトランスジェンダー女性シャキーラ・ガリンデス氏が、男性用拘禁施設で差別や暴力、国外追放の危機に直面しており、亡命希望者の深刻な状況を示しています。

articles.title: ‘The Eternaut’ and civil resistance in the algorithmic age
articles.description: How can human rights organizations decipher the "gaps" in AI to reconnect with new generations and rebuild the community?
articles.titleJa: 「エテルナウト」とアルゴリズム時代の市民抵抗
articles.summary: 人権団体がAIの「ギャップ」を解読し、新しい世代と再接続してコミュニティを再構築する方法について探求しています。

articles.title: Trash and dignity: The rise of inclusive recycling projects in Latin America
articles.description: Across Latin America, initiatives like Eloísa Cartonera, Amazoniko, migrant recycling programs, and women-led cooperatives show how recycling can create jobs, dignity, and circular economy innovation.
articles.titleJa: ゴミと尊厳：ラテンアメリカにおける包摂的なリサイクルプロジェクトの台頭
articles.summary: ラテンアメリカ各地で、リサイクルが雇用、尊厳、循環経済の革新を生み出す可能性を示す包摂的なプロジェクトが台頭していることを紹介します。

articles.title: Brazil will feature the number 24 on the pitch during World Cup 2026. And that carries a message
articles.description: Four years ago, a group of activists sued to demand the use of shirt number 24 in the national team. The 2022 World Cup was the first time it appeared officially.

articles.title: From Ciudad Juárez to Latin America: The legacy of Ni Una Menos
articles.description: Born from Susana Chávez Castillo’s words and fueled by collective outrage, Ni Una Menos transformed public debate but is yet to change the reality women face.
articles.titleJa: シウダー・フアレスからラテンアメリカへ：「Ni Una Menos」の遺産
articles.summary: スサナ・チャベス・カスティージョの言葉から生まれた「Ni Una Menos」運動が、ラテンアメリカの議論を変えたものの、女性が直面する現実をまだ変えられていない現状を論じます。

articles.title: Meet three young people driving ecological activism in the Dominican Republic
articles.description: The DR’s tourism star is on the rise, but that narrative of prosperity conceals the less visible, more urgent issue of environmental pressure on coasts, rivers, and reefs.
articles.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国で生態系活動を推進する3人の若者たち
articles.summary: ドミニカ共和国で観光業が盛んな一方で、海岸、河川、サンゴ礁にかかる環境負荷という喫緊の問題に取り組む3人の若き環境活動家を紹介します。

articles.title: The seed guardian of Brazil’s Caatinga
articles.description: In Minas Gerais, Brazil, a catingueiro shares his home with the memory of his ancestors and generations of plant varieties.

articles.title: Can China target critics abroad with its new 'ethnic unity' law?
articles.description: Rights groups fear the new law gives Beijing legal authority to go after people beyond its borders.
articles.titleJa: 中国は新たな「民族団結法」で海外の批判者を標的にできるのか？
articles.summary: 中国が新たな「民族団結法」により、海外にいる批判者に対しても法的権限を行使する可能性があると人権団体が懸念している。

articles.title: What are US and Japanese soldiers doing in the middle of the Australian bush?
articles.description: The BBC's Katy Watson explains why troops are training in remote Australia, thousands of kilometres from any major conflicts.
articles.titleJa: 米国と日本の兵士はオーストラリアの奥地で何をしているのか？
articles.summary: 米国と日本の兵士が主要な紛争地から遠く離れたオーストラリアの奥地で訓練を行っており、その目的が説明される。

articles.title: Founder of Asian super-app Gojek sentenced to years in jail for corruption
articles.description: The case against Gojek founder Nadiem Makarim relates to a laptop deal made during his term as Indonesia's education minister.
articles.titleJa: アジアのスーパーアプリ「Gojek」創業者、汚職で禁固刑に
articles.summary: アジアのスーパーアプリGojekの創業者ナディエム・マカリムが、インドネシアの教育大臣時代のラップトップ取引に関連する汚職で禁固刑を言い渡された。

articles.title: Chinese tycoon sentenced to 30 years in US jail
articles.description: Guo Wengui branded himself as a China critic, gaining followers who backed his fraudulent schemes.
articles.titleJa: 中国の富豪、米国で30年の懲役刑を言い渡される
articles.summary: 中国の著名な批評家を自称した富豪、郭文貴が、詐欺的計画で支持者を集めた罪により、米国で30年の懲役刑を宣告された。

articles.title: India's biggest share sales tell the story of a country glued to its phones
articles.description: NSE and Jio Platforms embody the sweeping changes in how India has consumed, invested and transacted over the past decade.
articles.titleJa: インド最大の株式売却が語る、スマートフォンに夢中な国の物語
articles.summary: インド最大の株式売却であるNSEとJio Platformsが、過去10年間でインドの消費、投資、取引方法にいかに大きな変化があったかを示している。

articles.title: Indian journalists condemn 'denial' of voting and passport rights of prominent editor
articles.description: Rajagopal has alleged that he has been unable to renew his passport after his name was deleted from the electoral rolls.
articles.titleJa: インドのジャーナリスト、著名編集者の投票権とパスポート権の「剥奪」を非難
articles.summary: インドのジャーナリストたちが、著名な編集者ラジャゴパール氏が有権者名簿から名前を削除された後、パスポートを更新できなくなったことに対して、その権利剥奪を非難している。

articles.title: South Korea football coach quits as president calls for probe into World Cup loss
articles.description: South Korea was eliminated after missing out on a spot among the eight best third-placed teams.
articles.titleJa: 韓国サッカー代表監督が辞任、大統領はワールドカップ敗退の原因究明を要求
articles.summary: 韓国がワールドカップで敗退したことを受け、サッカー代表監督が辞任し、大統領は敗退原因の徹底調査を求めている。

articles.title: South Korea unveils $880bn chip and AI investment plan
articles.description: It comes as regional rivals like Taiwan, China and Japan are investing heavily in chip factories and other technology.
articles.titleJa: 韓国、8800億ドル規模の半導体・AI投資計画を発表
articles.summary: 韓国が半導体とAI分野に8800億ドルを投資する計画を発表。台湾、中国、日本などの競合国が同様に技術投資を強化する中での動き。

articles.title: Australian man charged with murder after dead girl found in suitcase in Thailand
articles.description: The body of Tunchanok Donhomla, 17, was found discarded near a railway track on Saturday, police say.
articles.titleJa: タイでスーツケースから少女の遺体、オーストラリア人男性が殺人の罪で起訴
articles.summary: タイで17歳の少女の遺体がスーツケースに入った状態で発見され、オーストラリア人男性が殺人容疑で起訴された。

articles.title: Debris falls after plane hits Beijing's tallest building
articles.description: Social media footage showed the moment debris from a small aircraft fell to the ground after a crash into Beijing's tallest skyscraper.
articles.titleJa: 飛行機が北京の最高層ビルに衝突後、破片が落下
articles.summary: 小型航空機が北京の最高層ビルに衝突し、その破片が地上に落下する瞬間がソーシャルメディアの映像で捉えられた。

articles.title: WTO MSME Group announces Small Business Champions, discusses AI and trade uncertainty
articles.description: On 29 June, the Informal Working Group on Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) and partner organizations announced the 2026 Small Business Champions. During meetings on 29 and 30 June, the Group held a thematic discussion on empowering small businesses to trade through artificial intelligence (AI) and continued a regular spotlight of small business leaders, among other key topics. The Group convened its annual consultations with the private sector, focusing on ways to help small businesses navigate trade uncertainties. Members welcomed Ghana as the 106th MSME Group member.
articles.titleJa: WTO MSMEグループが中小企業チャンピオンを発表、AIと貿易の不確実性について議論
articles.summary: WTOの中小企業グループは、2026年の中小企業チャンピオンを発表し、AIを活用した貿易促進や貿易の不確実性への対応策について議論した。

articles.title: WTO issues new edition of World Tariff Profiles
articles.description: The WTO published on 29 June the 2026 edition of World Tariff Profiles, an annual publication providing comprehensive information on tariffs and non-tariff measures imposed by over 150 economies. It is a joint publication with the International Trade Centre (ITC) and UN Trade and Development (UNCTAD).
articles.titleJa: WTOが新版「世界関税プロファイル」を発行
articles.summary: WTOは、150以上の経済圏における関税および非関税措置に関する包括的な情報を提供する年次刊行物「世界関税プロファイル」の2026年版を公開した。

articles.title: University of Nairobi Faculty of Law wins John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition
articles.description: The WTO co-hosted the Final Oral Round of the 24th edition of the John H. Jackson Moot Court Competition on WTO Law between 23 and 27 June. The University of Nairobi Faculty of Law, Kenya, emerged as the overall winner of the competition, with the National Law School of India University, Bangalore, finishing as the runner-up.
articles.titleJa: ナイロビ大学法学部がジョン・H・ジャクソン模擬裁判大会で優勝
articles.summary: WTOが共催した第24回ジョン・H・ジャクソンWTO法模擬裁判大会で、ケニアのナイロビ大学法学部が優勝し、インド国立法科大学が準優勝した。

articles.title: General Council Chair outlines way forward on WTO reform, identifies facilitators
articles.description: At a heads of delegation meeting on 26 June, the General Council Chair Ambassador Clare Kelly of New Zealand outlined the next steps for moving to the substantive phase of WTO reform, including indicative checkpoints to monitor progress. Reporting on her consultations with members, the Chair noted that many members underlined the urgency and importance of the work on WTO reform. She said that facilitators have been identified for the main areas of reform work, based on members' nominations.
articles.titleJa: WTO一般理事会議長がWTO改革の今後の進路を説明し、調整役を特定
articles.summary: 一般理事会議長であるニュージーランドのクレア・ケリー大使は、WTO改革の実質的段階への移行に向けた次のステップと、進捗状況を監視するためのチェックポイントを概説した。

articles.title: Members review five regional trade agreements, consider evolution of gender provisions
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Regional Trade Agreements (CRTA) on 25 June, WTO members reviewed five regional trade agreements (RTAs) involving 17 members and two non-members. They also reviewed other topics relevant to the Committee's work under the Transparency Mechanism for RTAs. At the request of members, the Committee heard presentations on approaches with respect to trade and gender provisions in various members' RTAs.
articles.titleJa: メンバーが5つの地域貿易協定を審査、ジェンダー条項の進化を検討
articles.summary: WTO地域貿易協定委員会は、17の加盟国と2つの非加盟国を含む5つの地域貿易協定を審査し、貿易とジェンダーに関する条項の進化についても検討した。

articles.title: Government Procurement Committee welcomes new observer, event marks GPA accession milestone
articles.description: At a meeting of the Committee on Government Procurement on 24 June, parties to the Government Procurement Agreement (GPA) 2012 welcomed Uruguay as its 39th observer. The Committee also discussed accessions to the GPA 2012 and issues concerning implementation of the Agreement. A side event marked the 10th anniversary of Moldova and Ukraine becoming parties to the GPA 2012.
articles.titleJa: 政府調達委員会が新規オブザーバーを歓迎、GPA加盟のマイルストーンを祝うイベント開催
articles.summary: 政府調達委員会は、ウルグアイを39番目のオブザーバーとして歓迎し、モルドバとウクライナがGPA 2012に加盟して10周年を迎えたことを祝うサイドイベントが開催された。

articles.title: SPS Committee addresses record number of trade concerns, transparency and SPS mentoring
articles.description: At a meeting held on 24-26 June, the Committee on Sanitary and Phytosanitary Measures (SPS Committee) addressed a record number of SPS-related trade concerns raised by members impacting trade in food products. The Committee also received readouts regarding work on transparency and agreed to renew a mentoring system for SPS officials in developing and least-developed countries.
articles.titleJa: SPS委員会、記録的な数の貿易上の懸念、透明性、SPSメンタリングに対処
articles.summary: SPS委員会は、食品貿易に影響を与えるSPS関連の多数の懸念に対処し、透明性や開発途上国向けメンタリングシステムの更新に合意した。

articles.title: Trade Policy Review: Philippines
articles.description: The sixth review of the trade policies and practices of the Philippines takes place on 24 and 26 June 2026. The basis for the review is a report by the WTO Secretariat and a report by the Government of the Philippines.
articles.titleJa: 貿易政策レビュー：フィリピン
articles.summary: フィリピンの貿易政策と慣行に関する第6回レビューが2026年6月24日と26日に開催される。WTO事務局とフィリピン政府の報告書がレビューの基礎となる。

articles.title: DDG Nordquist highlights role of trade remedies amid global trade challenges at Seoul Forum
articles.description: Speaking at the 24th Seoul International Forum on Trade Remedies on 23 June, WTO Deputy Director-General DJ Nordquist underscored the importance of transparent and predictable trade remedy practices in a period of heightened uncertainty for the global trading system. She highlighted the continued resilience of global trade, the growing use of trade remedy instruments by members, and the need for WTO reform to ensure that the multilateral trading system remains responsive to contemporary economic realities and emerging trade challenges. Her full remarks are below.
articles.titleJa: DDGノルドクイスト氏、ソウルフォーラムで世界貿易の課題における貿易救済措置の役割を強調
articles.summary: WTO事務次長DJノルドクイスト氏は、ソウル国際貿易救済フォーラムで、世界貿易システムの不確実性の中での透明で予測可能な貿易救済措置の重要性を強調した。

articles.title: Panel to review Indian measures on solar, IT goods; members share views on reform talks
articles.description: The Dispute Settlement Body (DSB) agreed at its meeting on 23 June to a request from China for the establishment of a panel to review measures in India affecting imports of solar cells, solar modules and information technology goods. The DSB Chair, Ambassador Guilherme de Aguiar Patriota (Brazil), convened an informal discussion after the meeting to take stock of members' positions on dispute settlement reform.
articles.titleJa: 太陽光・IT製品に関するインドの措置を審査するパネルが設置、改革協議でメンバーが意見交換
articles.summary: 紛争解決機関は、中国が求めたインドの太陽光・IT製品輸入措置の審査パネル設置に合意。紛争解決改革についても意見が交わされた。
